[2019-09-04 01:57] zera777 (Zera): @Gr4Fi 
Re: Extremely Unfair Challenge
Try this opening:
||1) E11 (1 = Wild Drone)
2) 111
3) 111
4) DAC
5) DDT Feral
6) DDTT1 (Hold Feral)
7) DDT1 Feral||
Buy a Blastforge eventually and Polywall + Feral for extra defense.
Make sure to deny the opponent's absorb by attacking their frontline units. If you have one extra attack, you can hold a 3 HP Warden and buy a Tarsier or something.

[2019-09-04 18:40] mrguy888: ive been saying feral needs a nerf for many years now
[2019-09-04 18:40] shadourow (Rando): Not loud enough, obviously
[2019-09-04 18:41] zera777 (Zera): What is your proposed nerf?
[2019-09-04 18:41] shadourow (Rando): But yeah, I don't really like those low econ red/green which revolve around Feral
[2019-09-04 18:42] mrguy888: i dont have a proposed nerf, such a thing is not required to say it needs nerfed
[2019-09-04 18:42] shadourow (Rando): I wonder, what about 4RRG ?
Make transitioning out of red way too easy, but make red/green way less powerful
Or is this a dumb idea ?
[2019-09-04 18:42] mrguy888: that is not necessarily a nerf
[2019-09-04 18:43] mrguy888: buffing feral would be a pretty big mistake
[2019-09-04 18:43] shadourow (Rando): But I especially think about those small red/green games when proposing this nerf
[2019-09-04 18:43] zera777 (Zera): What about a supply nerf?
[2019-09-04 18:43] shadourow (Rando): That's not a good way to balance the game
[2019-09-04 18:44] shadourow (Rando): Is there actually any players that liked the bombarder nerf ?
[2019-09-04 18:44] shadourow (Rando): I mean, the effect is ok, but is this really a nice nerf ?
[2019-09-04 18:44] mrguy888: there was a poll and nobody wanted that change
[2019-09-04 18:44] mrguy888: because that isnt a nerf
[2019-09-04 18:44] amalloy: that's not the same thing as nobody liking it after it was done
[2019-09-04 18:45] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): I'm on the bombarder nerf train
[2019-09-04 18:45] mrguy888: well, nobody wanted it because it was obviously a terrible idea, and it is still just as bad an idea
[2019-09-04 18:45] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): seems to have worked 🤷
[2019-09-04 18:45] zera777 (Zera): I don't mind having less Bombarder. It's a pretty beefy unit. Now it somehow feels even more powerful, even though it was technically nerfed.
[2019-09-04 18:45] deadhour: I liked the Bombarder nerf
[2019-09-04 18:45] shadourow (Rando): @mrguy888 Can you mute @DeadHour please ?
I dislike his opinions
[2019-09-04 18:46] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): nobody = 0, it was more than 1 who voted for the nerf. what's the problem right now?
[2019-09-04 18:46] deadhour: If you guys don't want me here just say it and I'll leave the server
[2019-09-04 18:47] mrguy888: well, the small number of people who say they prefer the supply change have been unable to coherently and logically explain why they think it is superior, because it really just isn;t
[2019-09-04 18:48] awaclus: >what's the problem right now?
the same it always was
[2019-09-04 18:48] shadourow (Rando): Well, the explanation is simple :
It removed that kind of stall situation where both players used to spam Bombarders
[2019-09-04 18:48] mrguy888: but it didn't do that
[2019-09-04 18:48] shadourow (Rando): But it wasn't a problem imo
[2019-09-04 18:48] velizar_ (Name): I believe it was only a joke (attempt), DeadHour.. You're alright.
[2019-09-04 18:49] mrguy888: and both players buying a unit isn't a problem
[2019-09-04 18:49] zera777 (Zera): Rhino, Bombarder, Feral, and Chieftain all lend themselves to a "train" strategy where you buy and use them in succession.
The idea of a supply nerf is that the train ends sooner, and you'd better have a good position by then. Whether this actually works, I don't know.
[2019-09-04 18:49] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): @Awaclus which was? I really don't recall.
[2019-09-04 18:49] shadourow (Rando): (Yeah, if unclear, I'm just meming. I don't take any pleasure to be mean at anyone without "ooledc" in his name)
[2019-09-04 18:50] zera777 (Zera): The Engineer/Rhino/Feral spam strategy for Extremely Unfair Challenge would not work if Feral only had 4 supply.
[2019-09-04 18:50] awaclus: the problem was that it's a non-prompt attacker defender that deals 3 damage and is ridiculously efficient
[2019-09-04 18:51] mrguy888: the problem is that spending 8bbr for a 4 hp unit with 3 damage on 2 stamina is too efficient
[2019-09-04 18:51] shadourow (Rando): What about... 9BBR ?
[2019-09-04 18:51] awaclus: 9BBR would make it less efficient, which might fix it
[2019-09-04 18:51] mrguy888: can you tell me how spending 8bbr for a 4 hp unit with 3 damage on 2 stamina went from not okay to okay, anyone who preferred lowering the supply?
[2019-09-04 18:52] zera777 (Zera): Whether the nerf actually worked or not, I don't think it made the game worse.
[2019-09-04 18:52] amalloy: @Zera the feral train is very different from the other trains you mentioned, because it's a permanent attacker. you don't need to limit feral by supply, because it makes the game continue to escalate
[2019-09-04 18:53] mrguy888: the only time a supply change is a relevant and fair nerf is something like antima comet, where it actually changes the fundamental properties of the unit by changing how many times your shift-e turn actually causes damage
[2019-09-04 18:53] amalloy: trains that yield soak are different, although i'm not going to take a position on bombarder
[2019-09-04 18:53] zera777 (Zera): Limiting the Feral supply would force the player to find something else for mid-late game defense.
[2019-09-04 18:53] shadourow (Rando): Yeah, and it's cost was totally changed, it was truly a new unit @ mrguy
[2019-09-04 18:53] awaclus: not limiting the feral supply also does that
[2019-09-04 18:53] mrguy888: the first antima is 23 gold for 10 damage but the second antima is only 3 gold for 10 damage
[2019-09-04 18:54] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): I'm not good at math, but 3 * 2 * 4 is less than 3 * 2 * 10.
[2019-09-04 18:54] mrguy888: right but 3 * 2 * 1 is not less than 3 * 2 * 1
